closureNotes.outcome:
Precursor alpha (1 of 4 before PR 1.1 URN reconcile resumes) landed on EB main at 34f063b (PR #312). Per v1.0.0 spec (SR PR #148 aa97d13): 4 scope files (root vitest.config.ts new, .roadmap/follow-up-register.json + .roadmap/decision-log.json patches, .dlp local SPEC.md). Root vitest.config.ts mirrors 7 @ectropy/shared/* alias entries from apps/api-gateway/vitest.config.ts with path.resolve transforms for repo-root __dirname; defines NO other vitest options (alias surface only). 4/4 previously alias-failing tests now PASS from repo root: project.routes.test.ts, speckle.routes.test.ts, uro-ws-auth.route.test.ts, viewer-token.route.test.ts. 110/110 GREEN total at PHASE_1. Zero per-app invocation regression. Deploy lane: deploy-to-dev PR label fired (first non-URN use of the lane post-recovery arc).

OUT-4 FU activity: FU-EB-VITEST-SHARED-ALIAS-RESOLUTION-1 (P1) closed clean with resolutionRefs pointing to merge SHA 34f063b. Three new FUs filed open for precursors beta/gamma/delta: FU-EB-VITEST-API-GATEWAY-DUPLICATE-POOL-CLEANUP-1 (P2), FU-EB-VOXEL-STREAM-SPEC-TIMEOUT-1 (P1), FU-EB-SCHEMA-VALIDATION-TEST-CURRENT-TRUTH-1 (P1).

OUT-5 DEC d-2026-06-06-vitest-root-config-alias-canonical appended to .roadmap/decision-log.json with substrate-corrected canonical shape (see overrideRecord).
closureNotes.overrideRecord:
One in-execution substrate-correction caught at EB CI before PR #312 merged:

1. DEC shape substrate-before-write gap (in-PR fix commit 98859af). Chat-side patch-decision-log.sh composed the DEC structure from memory rather than reading canonical decision-log.schema.v2.json. CI rejected on four shape violations: (a) alternatives[].rejected_because key (canonical is rejectionReason per #/definitions/alternative additionalProperties:false), (b) approvalDate as date-only string (canonical is implementedDate ISO 8601 date-time format), (c) non-canonical constraints key (not in schema), (d) non-canonical consequences key as flat object (canonical shape is nested positive/negative/risks). EB-CLI applied fix commit 98859af on feat branch before PHASE_4 squash-merge: canonical keys substituted, ISO 8601 timestamp used, non-canonical fields removed. CI re-ran green, PR squash-merged. Authoring-layer memory #25 violation: composed schema from memory instead of fetching canonical decision-log.schema.v2.json at substrate read.

Forward rule (substrate-correction lesson for next precursor beta authoring): patch-decision-log.sh template MUST be regenerated from canonical decision-log.schema.v2.json at the start of every spec authoring session that includes a DEC append. Beta spec already anticipates this lesson per its notes section (FU-EB-PATCH-DECISION-LOG-TEMPLATE-CANONICAL-SHAPE-1 filed separately to capture the chat-side template fix needed).
